subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken around 1920-12-15
subcodes.first_line: The Holy Spirit was always with Christ... It was hidden from others, but manifest to him. The story about the dove is simply a metaphor... From childhood it was apparent to him
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @innateness; early self-awareness of the Manifestations of God, @John the Baptist, @literal interpretation, @symbolism
